diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support for Genshin Impact. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hey, quick question about the refund policy. What's the general rule for Genesis Crystals?
[Agent] Sure, I can explain. Our standard policy is that all sales of consumable virtual items, including Genesis Crystals, Welkin Moon, and Battle Pass, are considered final once delivered to your account. That said, there are specific exceptions, for example unauthorized purchases on a minor's account, duplicate charges from a payment processor error, or cases where the Genesis Crystals were never delivered despite the payment clearing.
[Caller] Okay, and what about the Battle Pass? Same rules?
[Agent] Yes, the Battle Pass is also treated as a consumable product, so the same final-sale policy applies once the pass is activated on your account. If you purchased the Battle Pass but it wasn't activated, you would want to open a ticket with proof of the failed delivery so our team can investigate.
[Caller] Got it. And is there a window in general for disputing a charge?
[Agent] Most payment disputes need to be raised within 14 days of the original charge for the quickest review. After 14 days it's still possible to request a review, but the process takes longer and additional documentation is usually needed.
[Caller] Cool. That covers what I needed. Thank you.
[Agent] You're welcome! Anything else I can help with today?
[Caller] Nope, all good.
[Agent] Have a great day!
